name: Hot German Potato Salad II
recipeIngredient: 6 medium to 8 medium potatoes, cooked and peeled
8 slices of raw bacon, cooked and crumbled
1/3 cup olive oil or bacon fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the potatoes into a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl.
2. Add the crumbled bacon to the bowl with the potatoes.
3. Place the olive oil or bacon fat in a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl.
4. Heat the chopped onion in the microwave oven for 5 minutes, uncovered, until lightly browned.
5. Add the vinegar and cook an additional 3 minutes.
6. Combine all ingredients with the potatoes; toss lightly.
7. Serve hot.
